title: Data matching for income, deductions and offsets
description: How to deal with a data-matching letter on income reported, deductions claimed or offsets received in your tax return.
keywords: data matching, data-matching, employment income, foreign source, government benefit, interest income, government grants and payments

child_links.title: Employment income letter
child_links.description: What to do if you get a data matching letter from us about the amounts your employer reported to us.

child_links.title: Government benefit letter
child_links.description: What to do if you get a data matching letter from us about a government benefit.

child_links.title: Interest income letter
child_links.description: What to do if you get a data matching letter from us about your interest income.

child_links.title: Taxable government grants and payments letter
child_links.description: What to do if you get a taxable government grants and payments letter and you disagree with the details we provided.

child_links.title: Offsets letter
child_links.description: What to do if you get an offsets letter from us and you disagree with the details we provide.
